sentences.text: Rex and Ron ran past a raptor in the dark.
Rip rested and Rob ran past a red raptor.
Rex got a rib and Ron got a red raptor.
Ron and Rip met a raptor and a rat in the dark.
Rex hid in the dark and a raptor ran past.
Rob and Rex got a red rib at the pit.
Rip and Rex ran past a raptor and a rib.
Ron rested and met a raptor in the dark.
Rex got a raptor and Rip got a rib.
Rob ran past a barn and met a raptor.
Rex rested and Ron got a red rib in a pit.
Rip ran and Rob ran and a raptor met them.
Ron met a raptor in the dark and rested.
Rex got a rib and Rip got a raptor.
Rip and Ron ran past a red raptor in swamps.
Rex got a rib and Ron got a rat.
Rip rested and Rex met a raptor in a barn.
Rob and Rex ran past a raptor and a rat.
Ron rested and a raptor and a rat ran past.
Rex met a red raptor and Rip got a rib.
